messages.content: Hi, I'm interested in the Samsung Gear S3 Classic. What's the story behind it?
brand new. newest technology.
How you ship it?
2 months
Is it still in box?
yes
How about $253.0? I pay right now.
the price is 275.0 dollars.
I really want this watch for my brother's birthday 🎂, but $275 is a bit steep for me 😔. How about we meet in the middle at $255.0? I'm willing to pay right away if we can agree on that price 💸.
275.0 is last

I'm really interested in the Samsung Gear S3 Classic, but $275 is still a bit too expensive for me. Can you lower it? I'm deciding between this and another one, so if we can't agree on a better price, I might have to consider the other option.
I'm not sure it's worth that much, considering it's not the latest model. How about we settle at $255.0?
ok i could do 255.0.
Cool, thanks for agreeing to $255.0.
<accept>
Hi, I'm interested in the Panasonic 32" TV. What's the story with it?
yes they are brand new
how much you want for it?
until january 2018
is tv in good condition?
it is actually brand new, never been used at all.
How about $90.0? I'm really interested in this TV for my kid, and I think that's a fair price 😊.
can we meet at 100.0?
I can do $91.4, that's my best offer.
that is way too low 98.7
I saw this Panasonic 32" TV for $93.0 elsewhere, so I can only go up to that price.
deal.
Cool, deal!
<accept>
Hi, I'm interested in the Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating. Can we discuss the details?
hi, are you interested in this home?
What condition is it in?
its right by Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating merrit
is it new or used?
yes, it is.
How about $2160.0? I'm deciding between this and another one, so let me know if you're interested in selling at this price.
could you do 2400.0?
I can do $2190.0, is that something you'd be willing to accept?
how about 2290.0 and we have a deal?
I'll take it.
awesome! thank you for everything
Deal! I'm excited to have finalized the purchase of the Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating at $2290.0. Thank you for the smooth transaction!
Hi, I'm interested in the $1295 Studio Apt in Richmond. Can we discuss the details?
1295.0 is perfect!!
Is apartment clean and ready to move in?
<accept>
Hi, I'm interested in the Used high end printer Dell 2130cn. What's the story with it?
I got this printer from a office, it's a high end laser jet but I haven't tested it myself. The other printer they gave me worked fine after I put in new ink cartridges.
How about $210.0? I think it's a fair price considering the printer is used and you haven't tested it yourself.
I can drop to $300.0, which is my limit, and I think it's a fair price considering the printer's high-end quality - this is already the cheapest one you'll find on the app.
I can do $218.0, that's my best offer.

I appreciate your offer of $218.0, but I'm afraid I won't be able to lower the price any further. This printer is a high-end model and it's basically new, considering it came from an office and I haven't had a chance to use it myself. My final price for this excellent condition Dell 2130cn is $300.0.
I'll give you $224.0 for the printer, I pay right now.
I appreciate your offer, but I can drop to $284.0, which is my limit. If you're ready to make a deal, I'll ship the printer today.
I really want this printer for my kid's school project 📚, but $284.0 is still a bit steep for me 😔. How about we meet in the middle at $252.0? It's the best I can do.

I understand that you really want this printer for your kid's school project, and I appreciate your willingness to meet in the middle. However, I've already given you my final price of $284.0, and I'm afraid I won't be able to lower it any further. As a special favor, I can offer you free shipping if you're willing to make a deal at this price.
I'll give you $255.0 for the printer, but if we can't agree on this price, I'm deciding between this and another one, so let's make a decision now.
I can drop to $277.0, which is my limit.
I'll take it.
Thanks!
Deal! I'm excited to get the printer for my kid's school project.
Hi, I'm interested in the 1BR apartment. What can you tell me about it?
The 1BR apartment is located at a great spot, but please note that pets are not allowed and parking is available for an additional charge. I can provide more details if you're interested.
Is apartment in good condition?
The apartment is well-maintained, but please note that the photos are representative and may not be entirely the same as the actual unit.
How old is apartment?
The apartment was built in 2010.
Considering the apartment's age and the fact that pets are not allowed, I think it's a bit overpriced. How about $816.0?

I understand your concerns about the apartment's age and pet policy, but I'm afraid $816 is a bit too low. I can drop to $1630.0, which is a great deal considering the location and maintenance. I really need to sell this place, so I'm willing to work with you to find a mutually beneficial price.
I saw this apartment for $987.0 elsewhere, which is a better deal considering similar locations and maintenance. I'm willing to meet you at that price.

I understand that you've seen similar apartments for $987.0 elsewhere, but I'm afraid I can't lower the price any further. My final price for this beautiful 1BR apartment is $1630.0. However, I'm willing to throw in a special perk - if you're willing to close the deal at this price, I can offer you priority access to the parking spot of your choice, which is usually an additional charge. This way, you'll get the best possible location and amenities without any extra cost.
I'm really interested in this apartment, but $1630 is still a bit out of my budget 😊. How about we meet at $1000.0? It's a great deal for both of us, and I'd love to make it work!
I can drop to $1590.0, that's my limit.
I can do $1200.0, I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I appreciate your enthusiasm, but I'm afraid $1200 is still below my limit. My final price for this beautiful 1BR apartment remains at $1590.0. If you're willing to meet me at this price, I can ensure that the unit is ready for you immediately and provide priority access to the parking spot of your choice.
I'm still interested, but I need a better deal. I can do $1360.0, and if we don't agree on this, I might have to consider another option that fits my budget better.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $1360.0.
Cool, let's finalize the details.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Livermore apartment. Can we discuss details?
Hello! Thanks for looking at the Livermore apartment.
What is condition of apartment?
The apartment is in good condition, featuring hardwood floors, new carpet, and spacious 2-bedroom layout.
How about $1330.0?

I understand you're interested in the apartment, but I have to be honest, $1330.0 is a bit lower than I was hoping for. I can drop to $1900.0, which is my limit, and I think it's a fair price considering the great condition and spacious layout of the place.
I can do $1380.0, I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I appreciate your willingness to pay immediately, but I was thinking more along the lines of $1860.0, which is my limit considering the great condition and spacious layout of the apartment. If we agree on this price, I can ensure you that I'll take care of all the necessary paperwork promptly.

I appreciate your counteroffer, but I was thinking more along the lines of $1430.0. I'm deciding between this and another one, so if we can't agree on this price, I might have to consider the other option.

I appreciate your counteroffer, but I can drop to $1580.0, which is my limit considering the apartment's great condition - it's basically new, with hardwood floors and new carpet. I think this price is fair given its spacious layout and ideal location in Livermore.
I understand your counteroffer of $1580.0, but I still think it's a bit steep considering the apartment's age and the fact that it's not entirely brand new. I can do $1490.0, which is my top offer.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $1490.0.
Cool, let's move forward with the paperwork.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System. What can you tell me about it?
The Swann 4 Camera Home Security System is a great product for home security needs, featuring a 4-channel DVR and 4 Pro-510 cameras with smartphone connectivity for both Android and iOS devices.
How about $115.0? It's a bit of a stretch for my budget, but I really need a good security system for my family 🙏.
I can drop to $165.0, which is already the cheapest price you'll find for this system on our app.
I saw this for $122.0 elsewhere, can you match that price?

I can drop to $159.0, which is my limit for the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System. To sweeten the deal, I'll also throw in free shipping so you can get your new security system up and running as soon as possible.
I can do $127.0, that's my best price for the system.
I can drop to $147.0, which is a great deal considering the quality of the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System, and I'm really trying to make this work for you since you seem like a serious buyer.
I can do $133.0, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.
OK, changing price now. I accept your offer of $133.0 for the Swann 4 Camera Home Security System.
Cool, thanks for accepting my offer.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the futon. What's the story behind it?
The futon is from a smoke-free home and has been well-maintained. It's a comfortable Springair brand full-size pad with an oak frame, perfect for sitting and sleeping.
I'm a student on a tight budget, so I'm looking for something affordable. What do you have in mind for the price of the futon?
I'll propose a price soon, let's discuss the details first.
Is futon in good condition?
The futon is in good condition, well-maintained from a smoke-free home.
How about $62.0? I pay right now.
I can drop to $125.0, considering it's basically new and I paid a lot for this high-quality Springair brand futon with an oak frame.

I understand you think it's worth $125.0, but honestly, I don't think this futon is worth that much. Considering its age and the fact that it's not brand new, I'm willing to pay $78.1, which is my top offer.

I understand your concerns, but I'm afraid $125.0 is my final price for this high-quality futon. It's already the cheapest one here compared to similar listings, and I've taken into account its excellent condition and the fact that it's from a smoke-free home.
I can do $92.3, that's my best offer.
I can drop to $119.0, which is my limit for this high-quality futon. As a special favor, I'll also throw in free shipping to make the deal even sweeter.
I really appreciate the free shipping offer 🙏, but I'm still a bit tight on budget 😊. How about we meet at $108.0? It's the best I can do.
OK, changing price now, you've got a deal at $108.0.
Cool, thanks for the deal.
Thanks, please buy it.
Hi, I'm interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set. Can we talk about it?
Hello! Thanks for looking at the Rosewood Dining Table set.
Is table in good condition?
The table is in good condition, coming from a non-smoking, no pet home.
How about $300.0?
I can drop to $600.0, but I must inform you that someone else is also interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set, so we'll need to move quickly if you're serious about purchasing it.

I'm really interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set, and I appreciate your willingness to negotiate! 🙏 Considering the condition and the fact that someone else is also interested, I'd like to counter with $347.0 - it's a bit of a stretch for me, but I think it's a fair price. 😊

I appreciate your counteroffer of $347.0, and I'm glad you're interested in the Rosewood Dining Table set. Considering the condition and the other interested buyer, I can drop to $552.0, which is a fair price for this high-quality furniture. If we agree on this price, I'll make sure to pack everything carefully and ship immediately.
I appreciate your counteroffer, but I saw this Rosewood Dining Table set for cheaper elsewhere. Considering that, I'd like to counter with $370.0.
I can drop to $501.0, which is a fair price considering the condition and quality of the Rosewood Dining Table set.
I'll give you $415.0 for the Rosewood Dining Table set, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I appreciate your offer of $415.0, but I'm afraid I've already given you my final price of $501.0. However, I'm willing to throw in free shipping if we can close the deal at this price, which is a special favor considering the high quality of the Rosewood Dining Table set.

I appreciate your willingness to include free shipping, but $501.0 is still a bit too expensive for me. Can you lower it? I'm deciding between this Rosewood Dining Table set and another one, so if we can't come to an agreement, I might have to consider the other option.

I completely understand that you're considering another option, and I appreciate your honesty. I'm really attached to this Rosewood Dining Table set, but I also need to sell it due to some personal financial constraints. I can drop to $420.0, which is a significant reduction, and I'm willing to include free shipping as previously mentioned. This price is my limit, and I hope we can come to an agreement.
I'll take it.
Thanks for agreeing to purchase the Rosewood Dining Table set! I'm glad we could come to an agreement.
Deal! I'm excited to finalize the purchase of the Rosewood Dining Table set.
Hi, I'm interested in the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug. What can you tell me about it?
The Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug is a unique, handmade piece measuring 2.8 x 6 feet, featuring rare pinks and earth tones. We can discuss the details further if you're interested.
How about $380.0? I think it's a fair price considering the rug's age and potential wear.

I appreciate your offer of $380.0, but I can drop to $500.0, which is my limit for this unique Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug. However, I'd like to throw in free shipping as a special favor to make the deal more appealing.
I can do $396.0, that's my best offer.

I appreciate your counteroffer of $396.0, but I'm afraid I've already given you my final price of $500.0 for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug. This is indeed the cheapest one you'll find here, as others are more expensive. I've also included free shipping to make it an even better deal.
I'll give you $429.0 for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, and I pay right now if we agree on this price.

I appreciate your enthusiasm for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, and I'm glad you're willing to pay right away. However, I can drop to $490.0, which is my new limit for this unique piece. I'm really attached to it, but I need the money, so I'm hoping we can meet at this price.
I appreciate your new price of $490.0, but I saw this Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug for cheaper elsewhere. I'm willing to pay $441.0, which is my best offer.
Sorry, $490.0 is my final price for the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug.
I'm really attached to this Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, but I'm on a tight budget 🤗. How about we meet at $462.0? It's the best I can do 😊.

I understand you're attached to the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug, and I appreciate your offer of $462.0. However, considering its excellent condition - it's basically new and a rare find - I can drop to $485.0, which is my new limit for this unique piece.
OK.
Thanks!
Deal! I'm excited to finalize the purchase of the Moroccan Berber Azilal Vintage Rug.
